message:
feat(supabase): rebuild Supabase connector with V3-native FcpConnector trait

Full V3-native connector for Supabase BaaS platform:
- 11 operations: query, insert, update, upsert, delete, rpc,
  schema.tables, storage.upload/download/delete, health
- PostgREST API for CRUD, /rpc/ for stored functions
- Storage API for file upload/download/delete
- ConnectorRuntime + RetryLoop with rate limit handling
- ConnectorErrorMapping: Http/Json/Api/RateLimited/Auth/NotFound
- Auth: apikey header + Bearer token (anon or service_role)
- Input validation: identifier normalization, path sanitization
- Doctor, SelfCheck via OpenAPI health endpoint
- Safety: Safe (reads), Risky (writes), Dangerous (deletes)
- 82 tests across types (18), error (14), client (20), connector (30)
- Closes bead j05nu.3.3.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-supabase"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+publish = false
+description = "FCP Supabase connector for PostgREST CRUD, RPC, and Storage operations"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-supabase"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_supabase"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core.workspace = true
+fcp-sdk.workspace = true
+fcp-async-core.workspace = true
+reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["json"] }
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
+async-trait.workspace = true
+anyhow.workspace = true
+sha2.workspace = true
+hex.workspace = true
+base64.workspace = true
+percent-encoding.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+fcp-crypto.workspace = true
+fcp-testkit.workspace = true
+wiremock.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,210 @@
+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.supabase"
+name = "Supabase"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Supabase connector for database queries, storage, and edge functions"
+archetype = "cloud-control-plane"
+homepage = "https://supabase.com/docs/reference"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:work", "z:private"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+
+[provides.operations.list_projects]
+summary = "List all Supabase projects"
+capability = "supabase.projects.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.list_projects.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.supabase.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.list_projects.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list all Supabase projects in the account"
+
+[provides.operations.get_project]
+summary = "Get Supabase project details"
+capability = "supabase.projects.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.get_project.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.supabase.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.get_project.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need details about a specific Supabase project"
+
+[provides.operations.query]
+summary = "Query rows from a table via PostgREST"
+capability = "supabase.database.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.query.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.supabase.co"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.query.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to read rows from a Supabase table"
+
+[provides.operations.insert]
+summary = "Insert rows into a table via PostgREST"
+capability = "supabase.database.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.insert.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.supabase.co"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.insert.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to insert new rows into a Supabase table"
+
+[provides.operations.update]
+summary = "Update rows in a table via PostgREST"
+capability = "supabase.database.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.update.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.supabase.co"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.update.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to update existing rows in a Supabase table"
+
+[provides.operations.delete_rows]
+summary = "Delete rows from a table via PostgREST"
+capability = "supabase.database.write"
+risk = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.delete_rows.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.supabase.co"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.delete_rows.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to delete rows from a Supabase table"
+
+[provides.operations.list_buckets]
+summary = "List storage buckets"
+capability = "supabase.storage.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.list_buckets.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.supabase.co"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.list_buckets.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list all storage buckets in a Supabase project"
+
+[provides.operations.list_files]
+summary = "List files in a storage bucket"
+capability = "supabase.storage.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.list_files.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.supabase.co"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.list_files.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list files in a Supabase storage bucket"
+
+[provides.operations.upload_file]
+summary = "Upload a file to a storage bucket"
+capability = "supabase.storage.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.upload_file.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.supabase.co"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.upload_file.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to upload a file to Supabase storage"
+
+[provides.operations.invoke_function]
+summary = "Invoke a Supabase edge function"
+capability = "supabase.functions.invoke"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.invoke_function.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.supabase.co"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.invoke_function.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to invoke a Supabase edge function"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 128
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
